SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF OCT-22-2008 - CONTINUED TO DEC-03-2008 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES ARE PRESENT, HOWEVER THE DEFANDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINED FOR COMMISSIONER SLAVIT TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-03-2008 - CONTINUED TO DEC-15-2008 AT 5:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 - DATE CERTAIN FOR TRIAL, NO FUTHER CONTINUANCES BY DEFENDANT. PLAINTIFF PRESENT. DEFENDANT NOT PRESENT. COMMISSIONER PAUL SLAVIT. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-15-2008 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-15-2008 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK P. SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH SIDES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-15-2008 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PARKSIDE LENDING, LLC IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT RODRIGUEZ, ALFONSO ENDEMA, INC. JUDGMENT FOR DEFENDANTS. THE COURT FINDS THAT DEFENDANTS ARE NOT LIABLE TO PLAINITFF FOR ALLEGEDLY PAST DUE LOAN PAYMENTS OWED BY A THIRD-PARTY BORROWER UNDER THE TERMS OF THE BROKER AGREEMENT OR OTHERWISE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
